summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Dipzee paywall implementation and landing page redesign. All backend APIs and frontend flows working correctly. Free plan removed, new users created with plan='none', paywall blocks access until subscription, superadmin access verified.
passed_tests: Backend: POST /api/auth/register creates user with plan='none'
Backend: GET /api/billing/config returns 6 packages (starter/pro/investor monthly+annual) with currency USD
Backend: Prices correct - starter: $4.97/$47.71, pro: $12.97/$124.51, investor: $24.99/$239.90
Backend: POST /api/billing/checkout accepts valid packages (starter_monthly, pro_monthly, investor_monthly, annual variants)
Backend: POST /api/billing/checkout rejects invalid packages (free_monthly, pro_weekly) with 400
Backend: Superadmin login works (douglas@snipertec.com.br)
Backend: GET /api/admin/stats returns plan_counts with keys: none, starter, pro, investor
Backend: Regression - /api/screener, /api/news/market, /api/watchlist, /api/alerts work for superadmin
Frontend: Landing page (/) loads without console errors
Frontend: Hero section contains ScoreDial component
Frontend: Top opportunities table present (data-testid=home-top-opportunities-table)
Frontend: Security & trust section present (data-testid=home-security-trust)
Frontend: Pricing section with 3 plan cards (starter, pro, investor)
Frontend: 'One number. A clear decision.' section correctly removed
Frontend: Footer present with institutional content
Frontend: Register new user redirects to /app/upgrade
Frontend: Onboarding banner shown on /app/upgrade (data-testid=onboarding-notice)
Frontend: Upgrade page shows 3 pricing cards with correct prices (US$4.97, US$12.97, US$24.99)
Frontend: Monthly/Annual billing toggle present and functional
Frontend: Paywall blocks access - trying to access /app/dashboard redirects to /app/upgrade for users with plan='none'
Frontend: Superadmin (investor plan) can access /app/dashboard normally
Frontend: Sidebar shows 'Investidor' plan for superadmin
Frontend: Login and Register pages load correctly with AuthLayout split-screen design
Frontend: Trial CTA and security microcopy present on auth pages
